testcase.name: Create a new container for queued user ids
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Create a new container for queued user ids &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/matchmaking.feature:9&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mno matchmaking container exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.noMatchmakingContainerExists()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create a matchmaking container&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.iCreateAMatchmakingContainer()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma matchmaking container exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.aMatchmakingContainerExists()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Read first and last user ids for random pairing
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Read first and last user ids for random pairing &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/matchmaking.feature:14&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma matchmaking container exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.aMatchmakingContainerExists()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe container has user ids &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m100&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m300&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.theContainerHasUserIds(int,int,int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI read the first and last ids for pairing&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.iRequestTheFirstAndLastUserIds()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI have the first user id &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m100&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.theFirstUserIdIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI have the last user id &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m300&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.theLastUserIdIs(int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Check whether container is empty before cleanup
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Check whether container is empty before cleanup &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/matchmaking.feature:21&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma queue container exists with no waiting user ids&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.theContainerHasNoUserIds()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI evaluate whether the queue container is empty&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.iCheckWhetherTheContainerIsEmpty()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe queue container reports empty status&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.theContainerIsEmpty()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI can remove the container associations&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.iRemoveTheEmptyContainer()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: I can check the size of a container to estimate wait time
testcase.system-out: Scenario: I can check the size of a container to estimate wait time &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/matchmaking.feature:27&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI have a container with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m4&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m user id references waiting&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.iHaveAContainerWithUserIdReferencesWaiting(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI check the size of the container&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.iCheckTheSizeOfTheContainer()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI have the container size of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m4&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.theContainerSizeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI can calculate an estimated wait time from the size&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# edu.citadel.MatchmakingSteps.iCanCalculateAnEstimatedWaitTimeFromTheSize()&amp#27;[0m
